goal: Abstract spawn/execution layer so gruAI dispatches work to any AI coding platform

risks: SpawnAdapter may be too Claude-Code-shaped — design from Codex's constraints upward, not Claude's patterns downward
Pipeline doc updates are high-surface-area changes to production-critical orchestration — a bug breaks all directive execution
Agent personality compiler gap between Claude's rich frontmatter and Codex's simpler model
over_engineering_flags: Auto-detect platforms at gruai init — manual config entry is sufficient for Wave 2
Personality compiler could spiral into a templating system — keep it to frontmatter field mapping

projects.title: SpawnAdapter interface + Claude Code impl + spawn-agent.ts wrapper + personality compiler
projects.scope_summary: Define SpawnAdapter as separate interface. Build ClaudeCodeSpawnAdapter. Create scripts/spawn-agent.ts as universal spawn entry point replacing all direct `claude -p --agent` calls in foreman.ts and pipeline docs. Build agent personality compiler. Update 09-execute-projects.md (~4 callsites), foreman.ts, and pre-flight cleanup.

projects.title: Codex CLI SpawnAdapter implementation + integration proof
projects.scope_summary: Implement CodexCLISpawnAdapter. Map Codex CLI spawn model to adapter contract. Test personality compiler for Codex. Write proof script spawning a task via spawn-agent.ts targeting Codex CLI. Document capability gaps.
